description_long: This is a plush toy with a large, rounded bald head, oversized purple and black eyes, and a small snout with two nostrils. Its ears are wide and point outward, giving it a whimsical, cartoonish appearance. The body is short and stout, with four stubby legs and a small tail at the back. The toy's lower body is covered in a darker brown patch, resembling shorts or fur markings. The surface appears soft and smooth, typical of stuffed toys, and the overall design is simple yet expressive. There are no visible accessories or brand markings.
description: A soft, cartoonish stuffed toy with a large bald head, big purple eyes, and a brown lower body patch. It has wide ears, a small snout, and four stubby legs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large head, big purple eyes, wide ears, and brown lower body patch.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the rounded head, protruding snout, and the curve of the back and tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, small tail, and the brown patch covering the lower body.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the head, snout, and tail from the opposite angle.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is wide-eyed and curious, with large, round purple eyes and a small, neutral snout. There is no visible mouth, giving it a gentle and innocent look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing on all four legs with the head slightly raised and ears pointed outward. The body is upright and balanced.
